title: MoreMons [Cobblemon]
description: Adds textures, models, animations (and spawns if installed as a datapack too) for Pokémon that currently lack them in Cobblemon.
body:
***MoreMons*** is an expansion datapack/resourcepack to the mod [***Cobblemon***](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon).

_(Make sure to install it both as datapack and resourcepack)_

_(The resourcepack may appear as if it is for a different version, don't know why when the version is correct but it works)_

# MoreMons
**MoreMons is a resourcepack/datapack that adds:  textures, models, animations and spawns to some of the currently non-implemented Pokémon in Cobblemon.**

These assets are all custom made by me, **Bruno22** :), following the [***handy tutorial***](https://cobblemon.com/guides/custompokemon) from the [***Cobblemon Website***](https://cobblemon.com), and with help from the nice chaps at the [***Cobblemon Discord Server***](https://discord.com/invite/cobblemon).

_(Well that's a lotta links)_

## Current list of Pokémon added by this pack:
 
>Dewpider, Araquanid,
>Heracross,
>Capsakid, Scovillain,
>Dreepy, Drakloak, Dragapult,
>Iron Valiant,
>Litwick, Lampent, Chandelure,
>Larvesta, Volcarona,
>Croagunk, Toxicroak,
>Drilbur, Excadrill,
>Annihilape,
>Absolutely humongous 14x14 blocks Guzzlord.

## List of Pokémon only included in the Reskin Pack:
### What is the Reskin Pack? Ever since MoreMons originally released some Pokémon have been added into base Cobblemon. In order to avoid bugs and unintended changes they have since been removed from the base pack. However, you can still find them on the Reskin pack.

>Ralts, Kirlia, Gardevoir, Gallade,
>Beldum, Metang, Metagross.

_(More to come, pictures in Gallery)_

***Question: What if one of these mons gets added to base Cobblemon?***
_Easy, I'll just remove it from this pack. In the future i might create another version of this pack retaining the original assets for it, idk_.
